intents.text: Replace raw substring pattern matching in zones.py with a _match_pattern() function that distinguishes pattern types (directory, basename, prefix, suffix).
Update classify_file() to use the new _match_pattern function.
Add shared COMMON_ZONE_RULES for vendor, generated, test, script zones and allow per-language rules to prepend with higher priority.
Fix potentials denominator mismatch: phase runners should exclude test/config/generated/vendor files from potentials count, not just from numerator.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: phase runners still count ALL files in potentials. This inflates pass rates

intents.text: Enforce ZONE_POLICIES.skip_detectors so graph-based and other detectors filter findings by zone before creating finding objects.
Add a user override mechanism so misclassified zones (e.g. production config.py) can be corrected via CLI.
Test the zone classification implementation against both React and Python projects to see how it actually works.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Did you test it in react + python to see how it actually works?
